name: Ollama MLX Engine Evaluation
goal: Research Ollama's MLX engine and write a version-verified evaluation doc at docs/research/2026-06-29-ollama-mlx-engine-evaluation.md

tasks.name: Verify Ollama Environment
tasks.description: Run ollama --version and ollama list to get current version and installed model tags. Resolve the gemma4 naming discrepancy (task references gemma4:9b but no such Ollama tag exists — likely gemma4:e4b). No file changes — read-only information gathering.

steps.expected: Version string like 'ollama version 0.X.Y'. Note: >=0.19 = MLX for -mlx tags; >=0.30 = GGUF also gets partial MLX
Table of installed models. Look for gemma4 variant (resolve 9b vs e4b discrepancy), qwen3.5 variant, any existing -mlx tags

tasks.name: Write Research Document
tasks.description: Write docs/research/2026-06-29-ollama-mlx-engine-evaluation.md incorporating pre-gathered research facts and Task 1 environment check results. See plan markdown for full content structure and pre-gathered facts. Stage the file after writing.

steps.description: Write research document — incorporate Task 1 version/model facts into template in plan markdown. Fill all [bracketed] sections before writing.
steps.expected: File docs/research/2026-06-29-ollama-mlx-engine-evaluation.md created with version-verified facts and clear ADOPT/WAIT/REJECT recommendation
File staged, not committed. (docs/ is in .gitignore — -f required for new files)
